description: Take training to the next level with these Adizero Mana 6 shoes from adidas. The sleek design with the light-weight design and high performance features helps you train better for longer. Team these with jeans and tees for a cool casual look.UpperAir mesh uppers with synthetic overlays for excellent ventillationadidas patented 3-Stripe design on the sides for enhanced support and to exude the brand’s belief in performanceLace-ups for snug FitMesh tongue for greater breathabilityCushioned collar for greater comfortBrand name embossed on the tongue and behind the collarMidsoleadiPRENE® in the forefoot maintains propulsion and efficiencyPhylon midsole provides lightweight comfortOutsoleadiPRENE® under the heel with a scooped out cavity gives superior cushioning at impactadiWEAR® outsole in a slightly angular strips on the forefoot offers high-wear durabilityPro-moderator™ medial support device prevents overpronationTORSION® provides adaptive midfoot supportFlex grooves provide greater flexibility to the feetshoe careWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dirtDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
